problem id: 2dcfc1a3
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1)

examples:
  00100011 -> 01000110
  01011110 -> 10111100
  00001011 -> 00010110
  11100111 -> 11001111
  00110100 -> 01101000
  10000001 -> 00000011
  00100111 -> 01001110
  01001100 -> 10011000
  01101001 -> 11010010
  11010100 -> 10101001

query: 00010100
predicted answer: 00101000
